_comment: Tier-1 mcp_tool source preset for vector-mcp (AU-KG.ingest.mcp-tool-connector). NOTE: vector-mcp IS a vector backend, not a primary KG data source — native data ingestion is intentionally SKIPPED for this package. This preset only exposes the collection inventory (list_collections) as lightweight metadata documents so the KG can register which vector collections exist; it does not pull document/chunk payloads. Contributed presets win over the central MCP_TOOL_PRESETS.
